falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5500 (previous all-time high) with a volume exceeding 2.5 billion shares on a single trading day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a confirmed blowoff top pattern, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing a clear reversal in market momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the CBOE VIX crosses below 12.0 while the S&P 500 makes a new 6-month high
falsification_conditions.what_itWould_mean: This combination would confirm extreme complacency and contradict the 'HOLD' signal by showing a divergence between volatility and price action

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would directly contradict the 'HOLD' signal by introducing a major macroeconomic catalyst that would invalidate the current pattern analysis

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
